description: Delphi Podcast discusses the future of AI with David Menarsh, co-founder of Valerie and OLAS, focusing on multi-agent systems and the evolution of autonomous AI agents.
topic_summary: The conversation explores the potential for a million models in AI versus a few large models, the unique background of the Valerie team, and the vision for creating general-purpose autonomous AI agents that users can own and operate independently [t=51:85].
